headline: NEA Names Philip Chopin Managing Director, Head of Europe and Promotes Two Investors
summary: MENLO PARK, Calif., June 29, 2026--Global venture capital firm New Enterprise Associates, Inc. (NEA) today announced several promotions across the firm's investment team, including the appointment of Philip Chopin as Managing Director, Head of Europe. The firm also promoted technology investors Ayush Goradia and James Kaplan to Principal.

headline: Workday (WDAY) Expands Its Solutions Portfolio As Customer Demand Spreads Across Industries
summary: Workday expanded its solutions portfolio to deepen coverage of human capital and financial management tools. The company is seeing strong customer demand and broader adoption across industries including education, public sector, and financial services. This expansion is supporting renewals and growth opportunities within Workday's existing customer base. headline: Workday (WDAY) Soars 9.2%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
summary: Workday (WDAY) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
